Off Calendar Mar-16-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Apportionment Proceeding and Order to Distribute Settlement Funds hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
T. Scott Hames, Esq. for Plaintiff Corolyn S. Plants, present with Melissa Plants and Lawrence Plants. Parties present were sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony by the parties present, declarations received in the Court's file by Laura L. Nugent, Daniel W. Plants, Sheila Whittington.
The Court, having reviewed the moving papers, documents received and oral testimony, taken this matter under submission.
Order granted and signed by Comm. Sue Kaplan, see scanned doc for details of the break down.
